textByHash.449eec262032face7021b088cb7be7ffe76a85da: I'm helpin' ta protect the base camp. How about you, what are you doing here?
textByHash.aefe1d5fa6bc9ef4ce9f64810c67342d4894c247: Good, we can always use extra help. Just make sure you don't go getting into any trouble or you'll have me to deal with!
